sigWerNormalizedGold: 唉 呀 你 听 到 吗
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 哎 呀 你 听 得 懂 吗

sigWerErrors.reason: '唉' and '哎' are both interjections with similar pronunciation and meaning in Chinese, so this does not affect the meaning.
'得' is part of the phrase '听得懂', which changes the meaning from 'hear' (听到) to 'understand' (听得懂), altering the intent of the sentence.
